details.test: Task 1: Provision 3 prod app servers in cheapest US region
Task 2: Configure high-severity CPU alert for payments cluster
Task 3: Create canary deployment pipeline for billing-api
Task 5: Create ReadOnly Analytics role and assign to analyst01
Task 6: Schedule maintenance window for orders-db-cluster
Task 7: Tag highest-cost Marketing service for January 2024 as Review-Cost
Task 8: Configure daily backup policy for customer-logs bucket
Task 9: Create Production Overview dashboard with CPU and error widgets
